name: CarMaker_Subscribe
title: CarMaker_Subscribe
description: Subscribes a group of CarMaker quantities as CANoe system variables. The CANoe system variables are defined in the CarMaker system variable namespace. Each call to this function automatically unsubscribes any previous subscription.

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: Name of the group of quantities to subscribe.

parameters.name: freq_hz
parameters.description: The frequency at which the values are to be sent. The reception is then processed inside the polling function.

example.code:
// subscribe to quantities of CarMaker
gErrorState = CarMaker_Subscribe("TC1_Group", gFreq_Hz);

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
